creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You have php 4.4.2, which is pretty old. Can you check your 
/usr/local/etc/php.conf file? It should contain line like this: 

PHP_SAPI=cli mod 

if that line is not there, you will have to update your php installation first. 
Let me know if that solved your problem.
